issues.description: Missing condition to check if Character has 7000 power or more. Current condition is 'Always' but effect text requires power check.
Filter uses 'excludeSelf' but effect specifies exclusion of '[Emporio.Ivankov]' by name, not self-reference. Should use 'excludeName' or similar.
Effect text says 'up to 1' but DSL lacks quantity limit. Should include 'quantity':1 or 'maxCount':1.
